# Meeting Templates Collection

## Purpose
Provide standardized formats and agendas for essential project meetings so teams align on outcomes,
track decisions, and maintain consistent governance.

## Audience
Project Managers, Scrum Masters, Team Leads, Stakeholders, Sponsors, PMO.

## When to Use
Use these templates throughout the project lifecycle for governance, delivery, and stakeholder
alignment. Agile ceremonies are covered in dedicated templates referenced below to avoid
duplication.

## Meeting Types Covered
- Project kickoff meeting
- Weekly team meeting
- Stakeholder review meeting
- Risk review meeting
- Change Control Board (CCB) meeting
- Steering committee meeting
- Agile ceremonies (links only):
  - Sprint planning (`docs/templates/product/sprint-plan-template-agile.md`)
  - Sprint review (`docs/templates/product/sprint-review-template-agile.md`)
  - Sprint retrospective (`docs/templates/product/retro-notes-template-agile.md`)
  - Daily standup (`docs/templates/product/daily-standup-template-agile.md`)

---

## Project Kickoff Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** [Project Name] Kickoff
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting owner:** [Project Manager]
- **Facilitator:** [Name]
- **Note taker:** [Name]

### Required Attendees
- [ ] Project sponsor
- [ ] Project manager
- [ ] Core delivery team
- [ ] Key stakeholders

### Optional Attendees
- [ ] Subject matter experts
- [ ] Operations/support

### Pre-Meeting Preparation
**Send 3–5 business days before**
- [ ] Project charter or business case
- [ ] High-level schedule and milestones
- [ ] RACI or roles and responsibilities draft
- [ ] Meeting agenda

**Prepare materials**
- [ ] Project overview deck
- [ ] Scope and deliverables summary
- [ ] Initial risk register or assumptions
- [ ] Communication plan draft

### Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Welcome & introductions | PM | Participants aligned |
|  | 10 min | Business context & objectives | Sponsor | Shared vision |
|  | 15 min | Scope, deliverables, exclusions | PM | Clear boundaries |
|  | 10 min | Schedule & milestones | PM | Timeline understanding |
|  | 10 min | Roles & responsibilities | PM | Ownership clarity |
|  | 10 min | Governance & decision-making | PM | Decision flow agreed |
|  | 10 min | Risks, assumptions, constraints | PM | Initial awareness |
|  | 10 min | Communications & cadence | PM | Cadence confirmed |
|  | 5 min | Next steps & actions | PM | Owners assigned |
|  | 5 min | Q&A | All | Questions answered |

### Key Discussion Prompts
- Why are we doing this project and what success looks like?
- What is in scope vs. explicitly out of scope?
- How will decisions be made and escalated?
- What are the top 3 risks or uncertainties?

### Action Items
| Action | Owner | Due Date | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

### Success Criteria Checklist
- [ ] Project purpose and goals understood
- [ ] Roles and responsibilities agreed
- [ ] Communication cadence confirmed
- [ ] Initial risks and dependencies captured
- [ ] Next steps with owners and dates

---

## Weekly Team Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** [Project Name] Weekly Team Meeting
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Recurrence:** Weekly
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting owner:** [Project Manager]

### Standard Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Check-in & highlights | PM | Context set |
|  | 20 min | Progress review | Team | Progress shared |
|  | 15 min | Upcoming work | Team | Next steps aligned |
|  | 10 min | Issues & blockers | Team | Impediments logged |
|  | 5 min | Decisions needed | PM | Decisions captured |
|  | 5 min | Actions & next steps | PM | Owners assigned |

### Progress Review Prompts
- What did you complete since last meeting?
- What is planned before the next meeting?
- What risks or blockers need support?

### Standing Items Checklist
- [ ] Review last meeting actions
- [ ] Schedule status (on track/at risk/behind)
- [ ] Budget/effort status
- [ ] Risk and issue updates
- [ ] Change requests or scope updates
- [ ] Stakeholder feedback

---

## Stakeholder Review Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** [Project Name] Stakeholder Review
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Frequency:** [Monthly/Quarterly]
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting owner:** [Project Manager]

### Attendees
- [ ] Project sponsor
- [ ] Key stakeholders
- [ ] Project manager
- [ ] Team leads
- [ ] SMEs as needed

### Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Welcome & objectives | PM | Context set |
|  | 15 min | Executive summary | PM | High-level status |
|  | 20 min | Progress vs. plan | PM | Status review |
|  | 10 min | Key achievements | Team | Wins shared |
|  | 10 min | Issues & risks | PM | Awareness created |
|  | 10 min | Upcoming milestones | PM | Forward look |
|  | 10 min | Decisions needed | PM | Decisions captured |
|  | 5 min | Next steps | PM | Actions assigned |

### Executive Dashboard Snapshot
- **Schedule:** [On track/At risk/Behind]
- **Budget:** [Under/On/Over]
- **Scope:** [No change/Minor/Major]
- **Quality:** [Meeting/Exceeding/Below]
- **Risk level:** [Low/Medium/High]

---

## Risk Review Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** [Project Name] Risk Review
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Frequency:** [Weekly/Bi-weekly/Monthly]
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting owner:** [Project Manager]

### Attendees
- [ ] Project manager
- [ ] Risk owners
- [ ] Team leads
- [ ] SMEs
- [ ] Sponsor (for high risks)

### Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Overview & objectives | PM | Context set |
|  | 20 min | Active risk review | Owners | Status updated |
|  | 15 min | New risk identification | Team | New risks captured |
|  | 10 min | Mitigation updates | Owners | Actions reviewed |
|  | 5 min | Escalations | PM | Escalation path set |
|  | 5 min | Action items | PM | Owners assigned |

### Risk Review Checklist
- [ ] Probability and impact confirmed
- [ ] Mitigation progress reviewed
- [ ] Triggers and indicators updated
- [ ] Escalation needs identified
- [ ] Owners and due dates confirmed

---

## Change Control Board (CCB) Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** Change Control Board
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Frequency:** [Weekly/Bi-weekly/Ad hoc]
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting chair:** [CCB Chair]

### Attendees
**CCB Members**
- [ ] Project sponsor
- [ ] Project manager
- [ ] Technical lead
- [ ] Business representative
- [ ] Quality representative

**Others as needed**
- [ ] Change requestor
- [ ] SMEs

### Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Opening | Chair | Meeting opened |
|  | 30 min | Change request review | PM | Requests understood |
|  | 15 min | Impact assessment | Tech lead | Impact documented |
|  | 15 min | Decision making | CCB | Approve/Reject/Defer |
|  | 10 min | Action planning | PM | Implementation plan |
|  | 5 min | Close | Chair | Decisions recorded |

### Change Request Summary
| CR ID | Title | Requestor | Scope Impact | Schedule Impact | Budget Impact | Risk Impact | Decision | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

---

## Steering Committee Meeting Template

### Meeting Information
- **Meeting title:** [Project Name] Steering Committee
- **Date/time:** [Date] [Start]–[End]
- **Frequency:** [Monthly/Quarterly]
- **Location/platform:** [Room/Link]
- **Meeting chair:** [Executive Sponsor]

### Attendees
**Steering committee**
- [ ] Executive sponsor
- [ ] Business sponsor
- [ ] IT/technical sponsor
- [ ] Finance representative
- [ ] HR representative (as needed)

**Project team**
- [ ] Project manager
- [ ] Program manager (if applicable)

### Agenda
| Time | Duration | Topic | Owner | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 5 min | Executive summary | PM | Status snapshot |
|  | 15 min | Progress report | PM | Detailed updates |
|  | 15 min | Financial status | PM | Budget transparency |
|  | 15 min | Risk & issue review | PM | Executive awareness |
|  | 10 min | Strategic alignment | Sponsor | Alignment confirmed |
|  | 15 min | Decisions required | Chair | Decisions captured |
|  | 5 min | Next steps | PM | Actions assigned |

### Executive Report Snapshot
- **Overall status:** [Green/Yellow/Red]
- **Key achievements:** [Top outcomes]
- **Critical issues:** [Top 3]
- **Budget status:** [Summary]
- **Schedule status:** [Summary]
- **Resource status:** [Summary]
- **Decisions needed:** [Executive input]

---

## Meeting Best Practices

### Before the Meeting
- [ ] Send agenda 24–48 hours in advance
- [ ] Share required pre-reads
- [ ] Confirm attendee availability
- [ ] Test technology and materials

### During the Meeting
- [ ] Start and end on time
- [ ] Follow the agenda
- [ ] Encourage participation
- [ ] Capture decisions and actions

### After the Meeting
- [ ] Distribute notes within 24 hours
- [ ] Assign owners and due dates
- [ ] Update project documentation

---

## Customization Guidance
- Align required attendees with governance policies.
- Scale agenda duration based on project size and complexity.
- Add org-specific terminology and branding.
- Keep templates lightweight for small projects.

## Document Control
- **Created:** [Date]
- **Owner:** [Name]
- **Next review:** [Date]
